query_title: Box Office 3D: The Filmest of Films

recommendations.title: Savages
recommendations.overview: A group of Italian tourists on a Caribbean holiday finds itself stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash.

recommendations.title: Mixed by Erry
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of the pirate mixtape empire of three brothers from Naples, Italy, during the '80s.

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Hams

recommendations.title: Mr. Blandings Builds His Dream House
recommendations.overview: An advertising executive dreams of getting out of the city and building a perfect home in the country, only to find the transition fraught with problems.

recommendations.title: Lockdown all'italiana

recommendations.title: Hellzapoppin'
recommendations.overview: Olsen and Johnson, a pair of stage comedians, try to turn their play into a movie and bring together a young couple in love, while breaking the fourth wall every step of the way.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

recommendations.title: The Turbo Charged Prelude for 2 Fast 2 Furious
recommendations.overview: Turbo-Charged Prelude is a 2003 short film, directed by Philip Atwell, featuring Paul Walker, reprising his role as Brian O'Conner, in a short series of sequences which bridge The Fast and The Furious with its first sequel, 2 Fast 2 Furious.
